svg.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif
svg.title: Queen MQ: agentic pipeline with partitions per session
svg.desc: Producers push to one queue (agent-tasks) split into ordered partitions per agent session. Two consumer groups (agent runner, tracer) each see every message. One slow session (tool call) stalls only its own lane.
